output:
# Meeting & Catering Quote — The Westmore Hotel Dallas

**Inquiry:** Texas Health Resources — Quarterly Leadership Offsite
**Date Requested:** Tuesday, June 16, 2026 (CT)
**Group Size:** 60 attendees, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
**Responder:** Meeting & Catering Manager

---

## Quoted Day Meeting Package — $89 USD per person

**Includes:**
- Westmore Magnolia Hall (2,400 sq ft), classroom set for 60
- Continental breakfast 7:30 AM CT (pastries, fresh fruit, coffee, tea, juice)
- Mid-morning break (cookies, yogurt parfaits, espresso bar)
- Plated lunch — choice of 3 entrees (chicken, salmon, vegetarian) with seasonal sides
- Afternoon break (Texas-style snack mix, lemonade, iced tea)
- AV: LCD projector, screen, podium, lavalier mic, two handhelds, Wi-Fi
- Pads, pens, water service, mints
- Dedicated banquet captain on-site

**Subtotal:** $89 × 60 = **$5,340 USD**

## Optional Add-Ons
| Item | Price (USD) |
|---|---|
| Pre-meeting reception (45 min, beer/wine + canapés) | $32/pp |
| Post-meeting cocktail hour, Westmore Rooftop | $48/pp |
| Branded conference bag (logo digitally printed) | $14/each |
| Custom F&B station (taco bar, BBQ, charcuterie) | $24/pp |
| Live band, 2 hours | $1,800 flat |

## Outdoor Reception Option
If interested in moving the evening to our outdoor courtyard:
- 2-hour reception, 60 guests
- Premium open bar + heavy hors d'oeuvres
- Ambient lighting, bistro tables, lounge furniture
- **$145 USD per person** all-in

## Tax & Service
- 22% service charge on F&B and room rental
- 8.25% Texas state sales tax
- Quoted prices are pre-tax and pre-service

## Hold & Confirm
We will hold this date and quote through Monday, May 19 — 5:00 PM CT. To confirm, we need a signed contract and a 25% deposit (refundable up to 14 days prior).

Thank you again for considering The Westmore. If you'd like to walk the space, I'm available any weekday afternoon next week.

— Aisha Khan
Meeting & Catering Manager
+1 (214) 555-0126
